name: BMR Calculator (Mifflin-St Jeor)
description: Calculate BMR using Mifflin-St Jeor formula.
seo_description: Calculate your BMR with the Mifflin-St Jeor equation — the most accurate resting-calorie formula. Enter weight, height and age for instant results.
result_context: Mifflin-St Jeor is the equation more validada clínicamente; precision ±10% to población general.
formula_display: Hombre: BMR = 10 × weight + 6.25 × height - 5 × edad + 5; Mujer: BMR = 10 × weight + 6.25 × height - 5 × edad - 161
steps: The calculador apply the formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: Not verifying that weight are in correct units before Calculate
Redondear values intermediums before of the calculation final (pierde precision)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condition is special
desc: Free online bmr calculator (mifflin-st jeor). Enter weight and height to get instant results.
